summary: Iteration 34 - IPL Search Experience Testing Complete. All features verified: 1) Bottom nav IPL rhombus button (deep blue diamond with white 'IPL' text), 2) GET /api/ipl/search returns categorized results (players, teams, matches, records), 3) GET /api/ipl/records returns 18 IPL records, 4) GET /api/ipl/players returns 20+ player profiles, 5) GET /api/ipl/caps returns 9 years of cap winners, 6) SearchPage shows IPL Records with batting/bowling/team categories, 7) Cap Winners horizontal scroll with Orange/Purple caps, 8) 10 IPL team logos in clickable grid, 9) Star Players grid with initials avatars, 10) Search bar with debounced search and hint chips, 11) PlayerProfileView with stats/achievements/bio (bilingual), 12) TeamProfilePage with history/fun facts/matches.
critical_code_review_comments: ipl_router.py: Well-structured search endpoint with regex pattern matching across players, teams, matches, records
ipl_data_seeder.py: Comprehensive seed data with 20 players, 18 records, 9 cap winner years - all with bilingual content
SearchPage.jsx: Clean implementation with debounced search, categorized results, hint chips for quick searches
PlayerProfileView: Full stats grid, achievements list, bilingual bio, teams history with logos
TeamProfilePage: Rich content with history essay, fun facts, key players scroll, matches section
seed_data_creation: IPL data seeded: 20 players, 18 records, 9 cap winner years in ipl_players, ipl_records, ipl_caps collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: All IPL features verified working: 1) Bottom nav has IPL rhombus button (data-testid='nav-ipl') - deep blue diamond with white 'IPL' text, 2) SearchPage loads with IPL Records (batting/bowling/team/special categories), Cap Winners horizontal scroll, 10 IPL team logos grid, Star Players grid, 3) Search bar with hint chips (CSK, Virat Kohli, Most Runs, Bumrah, Orange Cap) triggers debounced search, 4) Search results categorized into Players, Teams, Matches, Records, 5) Clicking team opens TeamProfilePage with hero banner, stats, history (English+Hindi), key players, fun facts, matches, 6) Clicking player opens PlayerProfileView with stats grid, detailed stats table, teams history, achievements, bilingual bio.

features_verified.ipl_caps_endpoint: GET /api/ipl/caps returns 9 years of Orange/Purple cap winners - WORKING

features_verified.search_page_players: Star Players grid with initials avatars and team badges - WORKING
features_verified.search_bar_debounce: Typing triggers debounced search with categorized results - WORKING
